settings.title: Monster Piercing | Gold Belly Rings
settings.text:
Indulge in pure sophistication with our Gold Belly Rings Collection, the epitome of luxury body jewellery. Crafted from high quality 14K solid gold, each piece is designed to elevate your style with elegance, comfort, and timeless beauty.

This exclusive collection features both dangle and non dangle belly rings, offering a choice between subtle sparkle and statement glamour. From delicate minimalist designs to diamond and gemstone details, every belly ring reflects exceptional craftsmanship and refined artistry.

Perfect for those who love dainty, feminine, and high end jewellery, our gold belly rings are made to shine with confidence and grace — a celebration of individuality, luxury, and modern style.

settings.question: Are your gold belly rings made from real gold?
settings.answer: Yes. All our belly rings are made from genuine solid gold – never plated or filled. We offer 14K, crafted for durability, comfort, and long-lasting shine.

settings.question: What styles of gold belly rings do you offer?
settings.answer:
• Dangle belly rings feature decorative charms that hang elegantly
    below the navel.
  • Non-dangle belly rings have a simple, classic design perfect for
    everyday wear.
  • Reverse belly rings display the charm above the navel, ideal for
    those who prefer a unique and modern look.

settings.question: What is the difference between regular and reverse belly rings?
settings.answer: Regular belly rings have the charm or gem below the navel, while reverse (top-down) belly rings feature the decoration above the piercing. Reverse designs are especially flattering when you want a visible charm on high-waisted fits or crop tops.

settings.question: Are gold belly rings suitable for new piercings?
settings.answer:
Solid gold is generally safe for healed piercings. For fresh navel piercings, it’s best to start with implant-grade titanium until fully healed, then switch to gold for everyday
wear.
